categories.description: CoD-style custom maps and Fortnite-inspired battle zones rebuilt as navigable WebXR environments. BSP geometry, tactical spawn systems, open-world POIs — all explorable in 6DoF from any browser.

customMapSystem.vrAdaptation: BSP geometry exported to GLTF/GLB via C2M pipeline. Spawn points mapped to VR teleport anchors. IWD textures re-encoded as WebP for WebXR. FastFile bundles replaced by MAL-PROPS-WAREHOUSE geoassets.
customMapSystem.fortniteIntegration: Open-world POI islands on PHI lattice grid. Build mechanics via spatial hand-tracking. Storm circle as 72Hz frequency field contraction from outer bosonic ring inward.

experiences.description: Decimated metropolitan combat zone. BSP-compiled cityscape geometry across 6 urban districts. Tactical spawn navigation and rooftop engagement lanes.
experiences.shortDesc: Urban warfare in full 6DoF VR. Spawn. Navigate. Survive.

experiences.description: 2km-squared open-world battle island with 20 named POIs. Desert, forest, arctic and urban biomes. Fortnite-inspired. Storm circle contracts at 72Hz lattice pulse.
experiences.shortDesc: 100-zone open world. Land anywhere. Fight everywhere.

experiences.description: Iconic compact map. Shipping containers, catwalks, 360-degree engagement. BSP geometry from Radiant. 6 spawn nodes, 5-second max engagement range.
experiences.shortDesc: 24/7 classic. 5-second engagement range. Always intense.

experiences.description: CoD4 Middle East urban environment remastered for VR. Alleyways, rooftop sniping positions, open courtyard. Full d3dbsp BSP geometry converted to GLTF.

experiences.description: Tilted Towers arena with hand-tracking build mechanics. Place walls, ramps, and floors in VR via spatial gesture. PHI lattice grid enforces optimal build angles.

experiences.description: Full 100-zone arena mapped to the 48-node Merkaba lattice. Each node is a named drop zone. Storm circle contracts from the bosonic ring inward to the foundation 8 — the final safe zone.
experiences.shortDesc: 100 zones. PHI lattice map. Last 8 standing wins.
